name: Easy Sweet-n-Sour Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork rib or loin chops (1/4-inch to 1/2-inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat; cook pork chops until browned, turning occasionally, about 10 to 12 minutes.
2. Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon salt over the pork; remove to a warm platter and keep warm.
3. Pour off drippings from the skillet; add remaining ingredients and the rest of the salt.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat; return pork to the pan.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes.
